title: Robot SF External Pedestrian-Prior Extraction Manifest v1
description: Metadata-only staging/preflight manifest describing how a pedestrian-prior extraction run would consume a license-compatible external trajectory dataset (ETH/UCY, SDD, or SocNavBench-derived): the external source type, provenance fields, the prior parameters the run intends to emit, and the authored-vs-dataset-backed separation. It declares the extraction PLAN only. It ingests no external data, stores no raw trajectories, and makes NO calibrated- or representative-prior claim until extraction_status is 'dataset-backed' with accepted provenance.

extraction_status.description: Lifecycle state of the extraction plan. 'blocked-external-input': a valid plan awaiting license-compatible staged data; 'proxy-only': schema/smoke run on a proxy fixture, never dataset-backed; 'dataset-backed': license-compatible external data has been staged and provenance accepted.

type.description: Allowed external source family for pedestrian-prior extraction.

external_data_asset_id.description: Optional pointer to the canonical external-data asset id in scripts/tools/manage_external_data.py.
